class.name: Clipboard
class.description: A class that implements a mechanism to transfer data using cut/copy/paste operations. FlavorListeners may be registered on an instance of the Clipboard class to be notified about changes to the set of DataFlavors available on this clipboard (see addFlavorListener(java.awt.datatransfer.FlavorListener)).

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the name of this clipboard object.
methods.returns: the name of this clipboard object

methods.name: setContents
methods.signature: public void setContents(Transferable contents, ClipboardOwner owner)
methods.description: Sets the current contents of the clipboard to the specified transferable object and registers the specified clipboard owner as the owner of the new contents. If there is an existing owner different from the argument owner, that owner is notified that it no longer holds ownership of the clipboard contents via an invocation of ClipboardOwner.lostOwnership() on that owner. An implementation of setContents() is free not to invoke lostOwnership() directly from this method. For example, lostOwnership() may be invoked later on a different thread. The same applies to FlavorListeners registered on this clipboard. The method throws IllegalStateException if the clipboard is currently unavailable. For example, on some platforms, the system clipboard is unavailable while it is accessed by another application.

parameters.name: contents
parameters.description: the transferable object representing the clipboard content

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: the object which owns the clipboard content

throws.description: if the clipboard is currently unavailable

methods.name: getContents
methods.description: Returns a transferable object representing the current contents of the clipboard. If the clipboard currently has no contents, it returns null. The parameter Object requestor is not currently used. The method throws IllegalStateException if the clipboard is currently unavailable. For example, on some platforms, the system clipboard is unavailable while it is accessed by another application.

parameters.name: requestor
parameters.description: the object requesting the clip data (not used)

throws.description: if the clipboard is currently unavailable

methods.returns: the current transferable object on the clipboard

methods.name: getAvailableDataFlavors
methods.description: Returns an array of DataFlavors in which the current contents of this clipboard can be provided. If there are no DataFlavors available, this method returns a zero-length array.

throws.description: if this clipboard is currently unavailable

methods.returns: an array of DataFlavors in which the current contents of this clipboard can be provided

methods.name: isDataFlavorAvailable
methods.description: Returns whether or not the current contents of this clipboard can be provided in the specified DataFlavor.

parameters.name: flavor
parameters.description: the requested DataFlavor for the contents

throws.description: if this clipboard is currently unavailable

methods.returns: true if the current contents of this clipboard can be provided in the specified DataFlavor; false otherwise

methods.name: getData
methods.signature: public Object getData(DataFlavor flavor) throws UnsupportedFlavorException, IOException
methods.description: Returns an object representing the current contents of this clipboard in the specified DataFlavor. The class of the object returned is defined by the representation class of flavor.

parameters.name: flavor
parameters.description: the requested DataFlavor for the contents

throws.description: if this clipboard is currently unavailable
if the requested DataFlavor is not available
if the data in the requested DataFlavor can not be retrieved

methods.returns: an object representing the current contents of this clipboard in the specified DataFlavor

methods.name: addFlavorListener
methods.description: Registers the specified FlavorListener to receive FlavorEvents from this clipboard. If listener is null, no exception is thrown and no action is performed.

methods.name: removeFlavorListener
methods.description: Removes the specified FlavorListener so that it no longer receives FlavorEvents from this Clipboard. This method performs no function, nor does it throw an exception, if the listener specified by the argument was not previously added to this Clipboard. If listener is null, no exception is thrown and no action is performed.

methods.name: getFlavorListeners
methods.description: Returns an array of all the FlavorListeners currently registered on this Clipboard.
methods.returns: all of this clipboard's FlavorListeners or an empty array if no listeners are currently registered
